heading: Conveyance of added lands to United States by Governor
label: 392b Conveyance of added lands to United States by Governor
text: The Governor of the Territory of Hawaii is authorized to convey to the United States any and all lands and interests in lands acquired by the Territorial Government under the provisions of sections 391b, 391b–1, 392c, 396, 396a of this title.
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of the last provision of section 4 of act , the remainder of which is classified to .June 20, 1938section 391b–1 of this title
